headline: Morgan Stanley Raises KeyCorp (KEY) Price Target to $26
summary: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) is among the 12 Best Very Cheap Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 2, Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) to $26 from $24 while maintaining an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm said it is increasing price targets across the mid-cap banking group by a […]
